% ======================================================================
% SUMMARY
% ======================================================================
\section*{Summary}
AI \& Data Engineering graduate from Istanbul Technical University with experience in NLP, LLMs, and agentic AI applications. Co-founder of Fiction Studios, an AI startup at Bilkent Cyberpark building LLM-powered tools for museums and tourists.

% ======================================================================
% EXPERIENCE
% ======================================================================
\section*{Experience}

\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Co-Founder}\rowdates{10/2025 - 07/2026}\\
{\itshape\href{https://fictionstudios.ai}{Fiction Studios}}\rowdates{Ankara, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Co-founded an AI startup at Bilkent Cyberpark — an accredited Turkish Teknokent. Built an LLM-powered guide app for museums and tourists. Wound down in 2026.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Junior AI Engineer}\rowdates{03/2025 - 07/2025}\\
{\itshape\href{https://cyberquote.com/tk/}{CyberQuote}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Built AI automations and agentic LLM implementations for Phillip Capital subsidiary. Intelligent systems for operations and customer-facing platforms.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{NLP Research Intern}\rowdates{07/2024 - 08/2024}\\
{\itshape\href{https://nlp.itu.edu.tr/}{ITU NLP Lab}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small Researched LLMs for financial applications: forecasting, sentiment analysis, tool usage, reasoning, and RAG implementations.}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{AIOps Research Intern}\rowdates{08/2024 - 09/2024}\\
{\itshape\href{https://havelsan.com/tr}{Havelsan}}\rowdates{Istanbul, TR}\\[2pt]
{\small AIOps research using software log data for predictive maintenance. Generated demos on HDFS logs.}\\[8pt]

% ======================================================================
% PROJECTS
% ======================================================================
\section*{Projects}

\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Tobor}\rowdates{2024 - 2025}\\
{\itshape Amazon Warehouse Robot}\\[2pt]
{\small Autonomous warehouse robot simulating Amazon logistics. Pathfinding, obstacle avoidance, task scheduling. Human/cargo detection with custom YOLO.}\\[2pt]
{\ttfamily\footnotesize Python \textbullet{} ROS2 \textbullet{} YOLO \textbullet{} Robotics}%
\hfill{\ttfamily\footnotesize%
\href{https://github.com/rusenbb/TheArchive/tree/main/university/ai-data-engineering/Amazon-Warehouse-Robot}{[GH]}\hspace{4pt}\href{https://youtu.be/h-Jxs_y9kNA}{[YT]}%
}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Biting The Bytes}\rowdates{2024}\\
{\itshape Turkish Diacritic Restoration}\\[2pt]
{\small T5-based transformer for restoring Turkish diacritics. Automatically adds accent marks and special characters for enhanced readability.}\\[2pt]
{\ttfamily\footnotesize NLP \textbullet{} T5 \textbullet{} Transformers \textbullet{} Turkish}%
\hfill{\ttfamily\footnotesize%
\href{https://github.com/rusenbb/TheArchive/tree/main/university/ai-data-engineering/Biting-The-Bytes}{[GH]}\hspace{4pt}\href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/rusen/diacritizeTR}{[HF]}%
}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{AIZheimer}\rowdates{2024}\\
{\itshape Machine Unlearning on SD}\\[2pt]
{\small Selectively removed concepts from Stable Diffusion 2.1 while preserving other capabilities. Content moderation and AI output customization.}\\[2pt]
{\ttfamily\footnotesize Stable Diffusion \textbullet{} Unlearning \textbullet{} CV}%
\hfill{\ttfamily\footnotesize%
\href{https://github.com/rusenbb/TheArchive/tree/main/university/ai-data-engineering/AIzheimer}{[GH]}%
}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{To-AI-or-Not-to-AI}\rowdates{2023}\\
{\itshape GPT Detector}\\[2pt]
{\small Ensemble method to detect AI-generated text using three fine-tuned models. Addresses academic integrity and misinformation concerns.}\\[2pt]
{\ttfamily\footnotesize NLP \textbullet{} Ensemble \textbullet{} Classification}%
\hfill{\ttfamily\footnotesize%
\href{https://github.com/rusenbb/TheArchive/tree/main/university/ai-data-engineering/To-AI-or-Not-to-AI}{[GH]}\hspace{4pt}\href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/rusen/gpt_detector}{[HF]}%
}\\[8pt]
\needspace{4\baselineskip}%
\noindent\textbf{Anime Recommender}\rowdates{2022 - 2023}\\
{\itshape Collaborative Filtering}\\[2pt]
{\small Personalized anime recommendations combining collaborative filtering and content-based approaches. RMSE: 0.289, MAE: 0.213.}\\[2pt]
{\ttfamily\footnotesize RecSys \textbullet{} Matrix Factorization}%
\hfill{\ttfamily\footnotesize%
\href{https://github.com/rusenbb/TheArchive/tree/main/university/ai-data-engineering/Anime-Recommender}{[GH]}%
}\\[8pt]
